# anthropic_tunnel_certificates (Data Source)

Lists certificates registered against an MCP tunnel.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_tunnel_certificates" "primary_certs" {
  tunnel_id        = "tunnel_01ABC..."
  include_archived = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `tunnel_id` (String)

### Optional

- `include_archived` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `certificates` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--certificates))

<a id="nestedatt--certificates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `certificates`

Read-Only:

- `archived_at` (String)
- `ca_certificate_pem` (String, Sensitive)
- `created_at` (String)
- `expires_at` (String)
- `fingerprint` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `tunnel_id` (String)
